---
# Generated by scripts/ingest_models.py — do not edit directly.
# Re-run the script to regenerate from ModelAtlasofTheEarth/sachau-2022-icesheet
title: "ISMIP-HOM benchmark experiments using Underworld"
---

```{=html}
<div class="model-page">

  <!-- ── Header ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <h1>ISMIP-HOM benchmark experiments using Underworld</h1>

  <div class="model-meta-block">
    <strong>DOI:</strong>
        <a class="badge-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.25914/fhew-h678" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="badge-doi-left">DOI</span><span class="badge-doi-right">10.25914/fhew-h678</span></a>
    <br/><br/>
    <strong>Creators:</strong><br/>
    <a class="badge-creator" href="/creators/till-sachau.html">Till Sachau</a>
    <a class="badge-creator" href="/creators/haibin-yang.html">Haibin Yang</a>
    <a class="badge-creator" href="/creators/paul-d-bons.html">Paul D. Bons</a>
    <a class="badge-creator" href="/creators/louis-moresi.html">Louis Moresi</a>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Tabbed content ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="tab-container">
    <div class="tab-nav">
      <button class="tab-btn active" onclick="switchTab(this,'snapshot')">Snapshot</button>
      <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab(this,'overview')">Science Overview</button>
      <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab(this,'setup')">Software &amp; Setup</button>
      <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab(this,'data')">Code &amp; Data</button>
      <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab(this,'meta')">Metadata</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Tab 1: Snapshot -->
    <div id="tab-snapshot" class="tab-panel active">
      <p>Knowledge of the internal structures of the major continental ice sheets is improving, thanks to new investigative techniques. These structures are an essential indication of the flow behavior and dynamics of ice transport, which in turn is important for understanding the actual impact of the vast amounts of water trapped in continental ice sheets on global sea-level rise. The software studied here is specifically designed to simulate such structures and their evolution.</p>

      <div class="full-width-image">
        <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModelAtlasofTheEarth/sachau-2022-icesheet/main/.website_material/graphics/gmd-15-8749-2022-f09.png"
             alt=""
             style="width:100%; border-radius:6px;"
             onerror="this.src='https://placehold.co/1200x500/D64000/white?text=M%40TE+Model';" />
      </div>
      
    </div>

    <!-- Tab 2: Science Overview -->
    <div id="tab-overview" class="tab-panel">
      <h2>Research Tags</h2>
      <div>
            <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/ice-sheet.html">ice-sheet</a>
            <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/benchmark.html">benchmark</a>
            <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/stokes.html">Stokes</a>
            <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/anisotropy.html">anisotropy</a>
            <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/mechanical.html">mechanical</a>
      </div>

      <h2>Associated Publication</h2>
        <p>
          <strong>ISMIP-HOM benchmark experiments using Underworld</strong><br/>
          Till Sachau, Haibin Yang, Justin Lang, Paul D. Bons, Louis Moresi<br/>
          <em></em><br/>
          <a class="badge-doi" href="http://dx.doi.org/10.5194/gmd-15-8749-2022" onclick="event.stopPropagation()" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="badge-doi-left">DOI</span><span class="badge-doi-right">10.5194/gmd-15-8749-2022</span></a>
        </p>

      <h2>Abstract</h2>
      <p>Abstract. Numerical models have become an indispensable tool for
understanding and predicting the flow of ice sheets and glaciers. Here we
present the full-Stokes software package Underworld to the glaciological
community. The code is already well established in simulating complex
geodynamic systems. Advantages for glaciology are that it provides a
full-Stokes solution for elastic–viscous–plastic materials and includes
mechanical anisotropy. Underworld uses a material point method to track the
full history information of Lagrangian material points, of stratigraphic
layers and of free surfaces. We show that Underworld successfully reproduces
the results of other full-Stokes models for the benchmark experiments of the Ice Sheet Model Intercomparison Project for Higher-Order Models
(ISMIP-HOM). Furthermore, we test finite-element meshes with different
geometries and highlight the need to be able to adapt the finite-element
grid to discontinuous interfaces between materials with strongly different
properties, such as the ice–bedrock boundary.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Tab 3: Software & Setup -->
    <div id="tab-setup" class="tab-panel">
      <h2>Compute Tags</h2>
      <div>
        <p><em>None specified.</em></p>
      </div>

      <h2>Software</h2>
        <p><strong>Underworld2: Python Geodynamics Modelling for Desktop, HPC and Cloud</strong></p>
        <p><a href="https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.5935717" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.5935717</a> · <a href="https://zenodo.org/record/5935717" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://zenodo.org/record/5935717</a></p>

      <h2>Model Setup</h2>
      <div class="full-width-image">
        <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModelAtlasofTheEarth/sachau-2022-icesheet/main/.website_material/graphics/gmd-15-8749-2022-f01-web.png"
             alt=""
             style="width:100%; border-radius:6px;"
             onerror="this.src='https://placehold.co/1200x500/2c8ec7/white?text=Model+Setup';" />
      </div>
      
      
    </div>

    <!-- Tab 4: Code & Data -->
    <div id="tab-data" class="tab-panel">
        <p><strong>Source repository:</strong><br/><a href="https://github.com/ModelAtlasofTheEarth/sachau-2022-icesheet" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://github.com/ModelAtlasofTheEarth/sachau-2022-icesheet</a></p>
    </div>

    <!-- Tab 5: Metadata -->
    <div id="tab-meta" class="tab-panel">
      <h2>Citation</h2>
      <blockquote>Till Sachau, Haibin Yang, Paul D. Bons, Louis Moresi. (n.d.). ISMIP-HOM benchmark experiments using Underworld. https://doi.org/10.25914/fhew-h678</blockquote>

      <h2>Licence</h2>
      <p>
        CC-BY-4.0
      </p>

      <h2>Funders</h2>
      <ul>
    <li>AuScope</li>
    <li>University of Tübingen</li>
  </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
function switchTab(btn, id) {
  var container = btn.closest('.tab-container');
  container.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
  container.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel').forEach(function(p) { p.classList.remove('active'); });
  btn.classList.add('active');
  container.querySelector('#tab-' + id).classList.add('active');
}
</script>
```
